name: String Uppercase
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class StringUppercaseNode(BaseNode):
    name = "String Uppercase"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/uppercase.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("text", "string", widget_type="text")
        self.add_output("result", "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        text = inputs.get('text', '')
        await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
        return {'result': str(text).upper()}

def register_node():
    return StringUppercaseNode
